name: Aspect
long_description:
Aspect helps creative teams consolidate 5 media tools into one platform. We provide everything a media team needs: ingest, local file streaming, review and approval, sharing, and archiving. With Aspect as one source of truth, AI search becomes especially effective across video, audio, faces, objects, and anything else your team could search for.

Check out aspect.inc/use-cases to see how different media teams use Aspect to deliver content faster.
one_liner: Intelligent media storage for creative teams.
